          <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">pre</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"python"</span>&gt;</span>DARK_BLUE = RGBColor(<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-number"</span>&gt;</span>0x1a<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span>, <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-number"</span>&gt;</span>0x1a<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span>, <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-number"</span>&gt;</span>0x2e<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span>)
LIGHT_BLUE = RGBColor(<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-number"</span>&gt;</span>0x41<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span>, <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-number"</span>&gt;</span>0x69<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span>, <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-number"</span>&gt;</span>0xe1<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span>)
GREEN = RGBColor(<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-number"</span>&gt;</span>0x28<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span>, <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-number"</span>&gt;</span>0xa7<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span>, <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-number"</span>&gt;</span>0x45<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span>)
ORANGE = RGBColor(<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-number"</span>&gt;</span>0xff<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span>, <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-number"</span>&gt;</span>0x8c<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span>, <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-number"</span>&gt;</span>0x00<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span>)
RED = RGBColor(<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-number"</span>&gt;</span>0xdc<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span>, <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-number"</span>&gt;</span>0x35<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span>, <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-number"</span>&gt;</span>0x45<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span>)
PURPLE = RGBColor(<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-number"</span>&gt;</span>0x6f<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span>, <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-number"</span>&gt;</span>0x42<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span>, <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-number"</span>&gt;</span>0xc1<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span>)
GRAY = RGBColor(<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-number"</span>&gt;</span>0x66<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span>, <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-number"</span>&gt;</span>0x66<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span>, <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-number"</span>&gt;</span>0x66<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span>)
LIGHT_GRAY = RGBColor(<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-number"</span>&gt;</span>0xf0<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span>, <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-number"</span>&gt;</span>0xf0<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span>, <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-number"</span>&gt;</span>0xf0<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span>)
WHITE = RGBColor(<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-number"</span>&gt;</span>255<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span>, <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-number"</span>&gt;</span>255<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span>, <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-number"</span>&gt;</span>255<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span>)

<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-function"</span>&gt;</span><span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-keyword"</span>&gt;</span>def<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span> <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-title"</span>&gt;</span>add_box<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span><span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-params"</span>&gt;</span>(slide, left, top, width, height, text, fill_color, text_color=WHITE, font_size=<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-number"</span>&gt;</span>14<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span>, bold=True)<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span>:<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span>
    <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-string"</span>&gt;</span>"""Add a rounded rectangle box with text."""<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span>
    shape = slide.shapes.add_shape(MSO_SHAPE.ROUNDED_RECTANGLE,
                                    Inches(left), Inches(top),
                                    Inches(width), Inches(height))
    shape.fill.solid()
    shape.fill.fore_color.rgb = fill_color
    shape.line.color.rgb = RGBColor(<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-number"</span>&gt;</span>0x33<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span>, <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-number"</span>&gt;</span>0x33<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span>, <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-number"</span>&gt;</span>0x33<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span>)
    shape.line.width = Pt(<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-number"</span>&gt;</span>1.5<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span>)

    tf = shape.text_frame
    tf.word_wrap = <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-literal"</span>&gt;</span>True<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span>
    p = tf.paragraphs[<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-number"</span>&gt;</span>0<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span>]
    p.text = text
    p.font.size = Pt(font_size)
    p.font.bold = bold
    p.font.color.rgb = text_color
    p.alignment = PP_ALIGN.CENTER
    <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-keyword"</span>&gt;</span>return<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span> shape

    <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-string"</span>&gt;</span>"""Add a text label."""<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span>

    p.font.size = Pt(font_size)
    p.font.italic = italic

<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-function"</span>&gt;</span><span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-keyword"</span>&gt;</span>def<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span> <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-title"</span>&gt;</span>add_title_slide<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span><span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-params"</span>&gt;</span>(prs, title, subtitle)<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span>:<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span>

    title_box = slide.shapes.add_textbox(Inches(<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-number"</span>&gt;</span>0.5<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span>), Inches(<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-number"</span>&gt;</span>2.5<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span>), Inches(<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-number"</span>&gt;</span>9<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span>), Inches(<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-number"</span>&gt;</span>1.5<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span>))
    tf = title_box.text_frame
    p = tf.paragraphs[<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-number"</span>&gt;</span>0<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span>]
    p.text = title
    p.font.size = Pt(<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-number"</span>&gt;</span>44<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span>)
    p.font.bold = <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-literal"</span>&gt;</span>True<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span>
    p.font.color.rgb = DARK_BLUE
    p.alignment = PP_ALIGN.CENTER

    sub_box = slide.shapes.add_textbox(Inches(<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-number"</span>&gt;</span>0.5<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span>), Inches(<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-number"</span>&gt;</span>4<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span>), Inches(<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-number"</span>&gt;</span>9<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span>), Inches(<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-number"</span>&gt;</span>1.2<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span>))
    tf = sub_box.text_frame

    p.text = subtitle
    p.font.size = Pt(<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-number"</span>&gt;</span>24<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span>)
    p.font.color.rgb = GRAY
    p.alignment = PP_ALIGN.CENTER

    slide = prs.slides.add_slide(prs.slide_layouts[<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-number"</span>&gt;</span>6<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span>])

    title_box = slide.shapes.add_textbox(Inches(<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-number"</span>&gt;</span>0.5<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span>), Inches(<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-number"</span>&gt;</span>0.3<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span>), Inches(<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-number"</span>&gt;</span>9<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span>), Inches(<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-number"</span>&gt;</span>1<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span>))
    tf = title_box.text_frame
    p = tf.paragraphs[<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-number"</span>&gt;</span>0<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span>]
    p.text = title
    p.font.size = Pt(<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-number"</span>&gt;</span>32<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span>)
    p.font.bold = <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-literal"</span>&gt;</span>True<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span>
    p.font.color.rgb = DARK_BLUE

    bullet_box = slide.shapes.add_textbox(Inches(<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-number"</span>&gt;</span>0.7<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span>), Inches(<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-number"</span>&gt;</span>1.3<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span>), Inches(<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-number"</span>&gt;</span>8.5<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span>), Inches(<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-number"</span>&gt;</span>5.5<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span>))
    tf = bullet_box.text_frame
    tf.word_wrap = <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-literal"</span>&gt;</span>True<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span>

    <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-keyword"</span>&gt;</span>for<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span> i, bullet <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-keyword"</span>&gt;</span>in<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span> enumerate(bullets):
        p = tf.paragraphs[<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-number"</span>&gt;</span>0<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span>] <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-keyword"</span>&gt;</span>if<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span> i == <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-number"</span>&gt;</span>0<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span> <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-keyword"</span>&gt;</span>else<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span> tf.add_paragraph()
        p.text = <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-string"</span>&gt;</span>f"• <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-subst"</span>&gt;</span>{bullet}<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span>"<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span>
        p.font.size = Pt(<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-number"</span>&gt;</span>20<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span>)
        p.space_after = Pt(<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-number"</span>&gt;</span>12<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span>)
        p.font.color.rgb = RGBColor(<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-number"</span>&gt;</span>0x33<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span>, <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-number"</span>&gt;</span>0x33<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span>, <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-number"</span>&gt;</span>0x33<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span>)

    <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-string"</span>&gt;</span>"""Diagram: How Tinker Works - Cloud Architecture."""<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span>
    slide = prs.slides.add_slide(prs.slide_layouts[<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-number"</span>&gt;</span>6<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span>])

          <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">pre</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"python"</span>&gt;</span>    title_box = slide.shapes.add_textbox(Inches(<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-number"</span>&gt;</span>0.5<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span>), Inches(<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-number"</span>&gt;</span>0.15<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span>), Inches(<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-number"</span>&gt;</span>9<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span>), Inches(<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-number"</span>&gt;</span>0.7<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span>))
    tf = title_box.text_frame
    p = tf.paragraphs[<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-number"</span>&gt;</span>0<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span>]

    p.font.size = Pt(<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-number"</span>&gt;</span>28<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span>)
    p.font.bold = <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-literal"</span>&gt;</span>True<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span>
    p.font.color.rgb = DARK_BLUE

          <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">pre</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"python"</span>&gt;</span>    cloud = slide.shapes.add_shape(MSO_SHAPE.ROUNDED_RECTANGLE, Inches(<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-number"</span>&gt;</span>3.2<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span>), Inches(<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-number"</span>&gt;</span>1.2<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span>), Inches(<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-number"</span>&gt;</span>6.5<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span>), Inches(<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-number"</span>&gt;</span>5<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span>))
    cloud.fill.solid()
    cloud.fill.fore_color.rgb = RGBColor(<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-number"</span>&gt;</span>0xe8<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span>, <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-number"</span>&gt;</span>0xf4<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span>, <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-number"</span>&gt;</span>0xfc<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span>)
    cloud.line.color.rgb = LIGHT_BLUE
    cloud.line.width = Pt(<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-number"</span>&gt;</span>2<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span>)

    cloud_label = slide.shapes.add_textbox(Inches(<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-number"</span>&gt;</span>5.5<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span>), Inches(<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-number"</span>&gt;</span>1.3<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span>), Inches(<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-number"</span>&gt;</span>2<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span>), Inches(<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-number"</span>&gt;</span>0.4<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span>))
    tf = cloud_label.text_frame

<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">pre</span>&gt;</span>

  <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">a</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"pilcrow"</span> <span class="hljs-attr">href</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"#section-9"</span> <span class="hljs-attr">id</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"section-9"</span>&gt;</span><span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">a</span>&gt;</span>
<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">div</span>&gt;</span>
<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">p</span>&gt;</span>Caption<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">p</span>&gt;</span>

        <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">td</span>&gt;</span>
        <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">td</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"code highlight"</span>&gt;</span>
          <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">pre</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"python"</span>&gt;</span>    caption = slide.shapes.add_textbox(Inches(<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-number"</span>&gt;</span>0.3<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span>), Inches(<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-number"</span>&gt;</span>6.4<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span>), Inches(<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-number"</span>&gt;</span>9.4<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span>), Inches(<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-number"</span>&gt;</span>0.5<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span>))
    tf = caption.text_frame
    p = tf.paragraphs[<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-number"</span>&gt;</span>0<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span>]
    p.text = <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-string"</span>&gt;</span>"Tinker handles GPU allocation, model loading, and checkpointing - you just write training code"<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span>
    p.font.size = Pt(<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-number"</span>&gt;</span>13<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span>)
    p.font.color.rgb = GRAY
    p.alignment = PP_ALIGN.CENTER
    <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-keyword"</span>&gt;</span>return<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span> slide

<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-function"</span>&gt;</span><span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-keyword"</span>&gt;</span>def<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span> <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-title"</span>&gt;</span>add_rl_loop_diagram<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span><span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-params"</span>&gt;</span>(prs)<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span>:<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span>
    <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-string"</span>&gt;</span>"""Diagram: RL Training Loop."""<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span>
    slide = prs.slides.add_slide(prs.slide_layouts[<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-number"</span>&gt;</span>6<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span>])

    title_box = slide.shapes.add_textbox(Inches(<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-number"</span>&gt;</span>0.5<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span>), Inches(<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-number"</span>&gt;</span>0.15<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span>), Inches(<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-number"</span>&gt;</span>9<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span>), Inches(<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-number"</span>&gt;</span>0.7<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span>))
    tf = title_box.text_frame
    p = tf.paragraphs[<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-number"</span>&gt;</span>0<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span>]
    p.text = <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-string"</span>&gt;</span>"Reinforcement Learning Training Loop"<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span>

    p.font.bold = <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-literal"</span>&gt;</span>True<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span>
    p.font.color.rgb = DARK_BLUE

          <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">pre</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"python"</span>&gt;</span>    state_box = slide.shapes.add_textbox(Inches(<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-number"</span>&gt;</span>6.3<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span>), Inches(<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-number"</span>&gt;</span>3.7<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span>), Inches(<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-number"</span>&gt;</span>1.2<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span>), Inches(<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-number"</span>&gt;</span>0.4<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span>))
    tf = state_box.text_frame
    p = tf.paragraphs[<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-number"</span>&gt;</span>0<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span>]
    p.text = <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-string"</span>&gt;</span>"state s'"<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span>
    p.font.size = Pt(<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-number"</span>&gt;</span>10<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span>)
    p.font.italic = <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-literal"</span>&gt;</span>True<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span>
    p.font.color.rgb = GRAY

<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">pre</span>&gt;</span>

        <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">td</span>&gt;</span>
        <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">td</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"code highlight"</span>&gt;</span>
          <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">pre</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"python"</span>&gt;</span>    formula = slide.shapes.add_textbox(Inches(<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-number"</span>&gt;</span>0.5<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span>), Inches(<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-number"</span>&gt;</span>6.2<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span>), Inches(<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-number"</span>&gt;</span>9<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span>), Inches(<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-number"</span>&gt;</span>0.5<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span>))
    tf = formula.text_frame
    p = tf.paragraphs[<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-number"</span>&gt;</span>0<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span>]
    p.text = <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-string"</span>&gt;</span>"Objective: J(θ) = E[Σ r(s,a)] → maximize expected reward"<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span>
    p.font.size = Pt(<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-number"</span>&gt;</span>14<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span>)
    p.font.name = <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-string"</span>&gt;</span>"Courier New"<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span>
    p.font.color.rgb = DARK_BLUE
    p.alignment = PP_ALIGN.CENTER
    <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-keyword"</span>&gt;</span>return<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span> slide

<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-function"</span>&gt;</span><span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-keyword"</span>&gt;</span>def<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span> <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-title"</span>&gt;</span>add_distillation_diagram<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span><span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-params"</span>&gt;</span>(prs)<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span>:<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span>
    <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-string"</span>&gt;</span>"""Diagram: Knowledge Distillation."""<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span>
    slide = prs.slides.add_slide(prs.slide_layouts[<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-number"</span>&gt;</span>6<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span>])

    title_box = slide.shapes.add_textbox(Inches(<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-number"</span>&gt;</span>0.5<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span>), Inches(<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-number"</span>&gt;</span>0.15<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span>), Inches(<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-number"</span>&gt;</span>9<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span>), Inches(<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-number"</span>&gt;</span>0.7<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span>))
    tf = title_box.text_frame
    p = tf.paragraphs[<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-number"</span>&gt;</span>0<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span>]
    p.text = <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-string"</span>&gt;</span>"Knowledge Distillation: Teacher → Student"<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span>
    p.font.size = Pt(<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-number"</span>&gt;</span>28<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span>)
    p.font.bold = <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-literal"</span>&gt;</span>True<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span>
    p.font.color.rgb = DARK_BLUE

          <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">pre</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"python"</span>&gt;</span>    kl = slide.shapes.add_shape(MSO_SHAPE.OVAL, Inches(<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-number"</span>&gt;</span>4.25<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span>), Inches(<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-number"</span>&gt;</span>2.9<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span>), Inches(<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-number"</span>&gt;</span>1.5<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span>), Inches(<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-number"</span>&gt;</span>1.2<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span>))
    kl.fill.solid()
    kl.fill.fore_color.rgb = ORANGE
    kl.line.color.rgb = RGBColor(<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-number"</span>&gt;</span>0x33<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span>, <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-number"</span>&gt;</span>0x33<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span>, <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-number"</span>&gt;</span>0x33<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span>)

    p.font.color.rgb = WHITE
    p.alignment = PP_ALIGN.CENTER

          <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">pre</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"python"</span>&gt;</span>    formula = slide.shapes.add_textbox(Inches(<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-number"</span>&gt;</span>0.5<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span>), Inches(<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-number"</span>&gt;</span>6.3<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span>), Inches(<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-number"</span>&gt;</span>9<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span>), Inches(<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-number"</span>&gt;</span>0.5<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span>))
    tf = formula.text_frame
    p = tf.paragraphs[<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-number"</span>&gt;</span>0<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span>]
    p.text = <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-string"</span>&gt;</span>"Loss = KL(P_T || P_S) = Σ P_T(y) log(P_T(y)/P_S(y))"<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span>
    p.font.size = Pt(<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-number"</span>&gt;</span>14<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span>)
    p.font.name = <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-string"</span>&gt;</span>"Courier New"<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span>
    p.font.color.rgb = DARK_BLUE
    p.alignment = PP_ALIGN.CENTER
    <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-keyword"</span>&gt;</span>return<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span> slide

<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-function"</span>&gt;</span><span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-keyword"</span>&gt;</span>def<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span> <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-title"</span>&gt;</span>add_preference_diagram<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span><span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-params"</span>&gt;</span>(prs)<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span>:<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span>
    <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-string"</span>&gt;</span>"""Diagram: Pairwise Preference Learning."""<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span>
    slide = prs.slides.add_slide(prs.slide_layouts[<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-number"</span>&gt;</span>6<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span>])

    title_box = slide.shapes.add_textbox(Inches(<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-number"</span>&gt;</span>0.5<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span>), Inches(<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-number"</span>&gt;</span>0.15<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span>), Inches(<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-number"</span>&gt;</span>9<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span>), Inches(<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-number"</span>&gt;</span>0.7<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span>))
    tf = title_box.text_frame
    p = tf.paragraphs[<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-number"</span>&gt;</span>0<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span>]
    p.text = <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-string"</span>&gt;</span>"Pairwise Preference Learning"<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span>
    p.font.size = Pt(<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-number"</span>&gt;</span>28<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span>)
    p.font.bold = <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-literal"</span>&gt;</span>True<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span>
    p.font.color.rgb = DARK_BLUE

          <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">pre</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"python"</span>&gt;</span>    comp = slide.shapes.add_shape(MSO_SHAPE.OVAL, Inches(<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-number"</span>&gt;</span>7<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span>), Inches(<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-number"</span>&gt;</span>2.5<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span>), Inches(<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-number"</span>&gt;</span>1.4<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span>), Inches(<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-number"</span>&gt;</span>1.2<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span>))
    comp.fill.solid()
    comp.fill.fore_color.rgb = PURPLE
    tf = comp.text_frame
    p = tf.paragraphs[<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-number"</span>&gt;</span>0<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span>]
    p.text = <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-string"</span>&gt;</span>"Compare\nPairs"<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span>
    p.font.size = Pt(<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-number"</span>&gt;</span>11<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span>)
    p.font.bold = <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-literal"</span>&gt;</span>True<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span>
    p.font.color.rgb = WHITE
    p.alignment = PP_ALIGN.CENTER

        <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">td</span>&gt;</span>

          <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">pre</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"python"</span>&gt;</span>    add_arrow_right(slide, <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-number"</span>&gt;</span>2<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span>, <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-number"</span>&gt;</span>2.65<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span>, <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-number"</span>&gt;</span>0.4<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span>)
    add_arrow_right(slide, <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-number"</span>&gt;</span>4.1<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span>, <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-number"</span>&gt;</span>2.65<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span>, <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-number"</span>&gt;</span>0.4<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span>)
    add_arrow_right(slide, <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-number"</span>&gt;</span>6.4<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span>, <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-number"</span>&gt;</span>2.95<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span>, <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-number"</span>&gt;</span>0.5<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span>)
    add_arrow_right(slide, <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-number"</span>&gt;</span>8.4<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span>, <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-number"</span>&gt;</span>2.95<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span>, <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-number"</span>&gt;</span>0.25<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span>)

  <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">a</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"pilcrow"</span> <span class="hljs-attr">href</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"#section-31"</span> <span class="hljs-attr">id</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"section-31"</span>&gt;</span><span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">a</span>&gt;</span>
<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">div</span>&gt;</span>
<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">p</span>&gt;</span>Win/Loss labels<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">p</span>&gt;</span>

        <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">td</span>&gt;</span>
        <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">td</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"code highlight"</span>&gt;</span>
          <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">pre</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"python"</span>&gt;</span>    win_label = slide.shapes.add_textbox(Inches(<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-number"</span>&gt;</span>6.5<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span>), Inches(<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-number"</span>&gt;</span>4.3<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span>), Inches(<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-number"</span>&gt;</span>0.8<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span>), Inches(<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-number"</span>&gt;</span>0.3<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span>))
    tf = win_label.text_frame
    p = tf.paragraphs[<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-number"</span>&gt;</span>0<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span>]
    p.text = <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-string"</span>&gt;</span>"✓ Win"<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span>
    p.font.size = Pt(<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-number"</span>&gt;</span>10<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span>)
    p.font.bold = <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-literal"</span>&gt;</span>True<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span>
    p.font.color.rgb = GREEN

    lose_label = slide.shapes.add_textbox(Inches(<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-number"</span>&gt;</span>6.5<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span>), Inches(<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-number"</span>&gt;</span>1.3<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span>), Inches(<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-number"</span>&gt;</span>0.8<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span>), Inches(<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-number"</span>&gt;</span>0.3<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span>))
    tf = lose_label.text_frame
    p = tf.paragraphs[<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-number"</span>&gt;</span>0<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span>]
    p.text = <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-string"</span>&gt;</span>"✗ Lose"<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span>
    p.font.size = Pt(<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-number"</span>&gt;</span>10<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span>)
    p.font.bold = <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-literal"</span>&gt;</span>True<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span>
    p.font.color.rgb = RED

<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">pre</span>&gt;</span>
        <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">td</span>&gt;</span>
      <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">tr</span>&gt;</span>
    
      <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">tr</span>&gt;</span>
        <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">td</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"docs"</span>&gt;</span>

  <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">a</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"pilcrow"</span> <span class="hljs-attr">href</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"#section-32"</span> <span class="hljs-attr">id</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"section-32"</span>&gt;</span><span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">a</span>&gt;</span>
<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">div</span>&gt;</span>
<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">p</span>&gt;</span>Reward formula<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">p</span>&gt;</span>

        <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">td</span>&gt;</span>
        <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">td</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"code highlight"</span>&gt;</span>
          <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">pre</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"python"</span>&gt;</span>    formula = slide.shapes.add_textbox(Inches(<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-number"</span>&gt;</span>0.3<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span>), Inches(<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-number"</span>&gt;</span>5.5<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span>), Inches(<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-number"</span>&gt;</span>9.4<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span>), Inches(<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-number"</span>&gt;</span>0.9<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span>))
    tf = formula.text_frame
    p = tf.paragraphs[<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-number"</span>&gt;</span>0<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span>]
    p.text = <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-string"</span>&gt;</span>"reward = (wins - losses) / comparisons + format_bonus"<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span>
    p.font.size = Pt(<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-number"</span>&gt;</span>14<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span>)
    p.font.name = <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-string"</span>&gt;</span>"Courier New"<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span>
    p.font.color.rgb = DARK_BLUE
    p.alignment = PP_ALIGN.CENTER

    p = tf.add_paragraph()
    p.text = <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-string"</span>&gt;</span>"Shorter responses beat longer ones → model learns conciseness"<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span>
    p.font.size = Pt(<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-number"</span>&gt;</span>12<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span>)
    p.font.color.rgb = GRAY
    p.alignment = PP_ALIGN.CENTER
    <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-keyword"</span>&gt;</span>return<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span> slide

<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-function"</span>&gt;</span><span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-keyword"</span>&gt;</span>def<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span> <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-title"</span>&gt;</span>add_lora_diagram<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span><span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-params"</span>&gt;</span>(prs)<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span>:<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span>
    <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-string"</span>&gt;</span>"""Diagram: LoRA Fine-tuning."""<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span>
    slide = prs.slides.add_slide(prs.slide_layouts[<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-number"</span>&gt;</span>6<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span>])

    title_box = slide.shapes.add_textbox(Inches(<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-number"</span>&gt;</span>0.5<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span>), Inches(<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-number"</span>&gt;</span>0.15<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span>), Inches(<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-number"</span>&gt;</span>9<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span>), Inches(<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-number"</span>&gt;</span>0.7<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span>))
    tf = title_box.text_frame
    p = tf.paragraphs[<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-number"</span>&gt;</span>0<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span>]
    p.text = <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-string"</span>&gt;</span>"LoRA: Low-Rank Adaptation"<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span>
    p.font.size = Pt(<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-number"</span>&gt;</span>28<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span>)
    p.font.bold = <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-literal"</span>&gt;</span>True<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span>
    p.font.color.rgb = DARK_BLUE

<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">pre</span>&gt;</span>
        <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">td</span>&gt;</span>
      <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">tr</span>&gt;</span>
    
      <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">tr</span>&gt;</span>
        <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">td</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"docs"</span>&gt;</span>
          <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">div</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"pilwrap"</span>&gt;</span>
  <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">a</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"pilcrow"</span> <span class="hljs-attr">href</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"#section-33"</span> <span class="hljs-attr">id</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"section-33"</span>&gt;</span><span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">a</span>&gt;</span>
<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">div</span>&gt;</span>
<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">p</span>&gt;</span>Original weight matrix<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">p</span>&gt;</span>

        <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">td</span>&gt;</span>

        (<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-number"</span>&gt;</span>7.5<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span>, <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-number"</span>&gt;</span>4.7<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span>, <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-string"</span>&gt;</span>"Combined for\ninference"<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span>, GREEN),
    ]
    <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-keyword"</span>&gt;</span>for<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span> x, y, text, color <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-keyword"</span>&gt;</span>in<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span> annotations:
        ann = slide.shapes.add_textbox(Inches(x), Inches(y), Inches(<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-number"</span>&gt;</span>2.2<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span>), Inches(<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-number"</span>&gt;</span>0.8<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span>))
        tf = ann.text_frame
        tf.word_wrap = <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-literal"</span>&gt;</span>True<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span>
        p = tf.paragraphs[<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-number"</span>&gt;</span>0<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span>]
        p.text = text
        p.font.size = Pt(<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-number"</span>&gt;</span>11<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span>)
        p.font.color.rgb = color
        p.alignment = PP_ALIGN.CENTER

<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">pre</span>&gt;</span>
        <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">td</span>&gt;</span>
