<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">div</span>&gt;</span>
<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">p</span>&gt;</span>Key insight<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">p</span>&gt;</span>

        <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">td</span>&gt;</span>
        <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">td</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"code highlight"</span>&gt;</span>
          <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">pre</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"python"</span>&gt;</span>    insight = slide.shapes.add_textbox(Inches(<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-number"</span>&gt;</span>0.5<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span>), Inches(<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-number"</span>&gt;</span>5.8<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span>), Inches(<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-number"</span>&gt;</span>9<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span>), Inches(<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-number"</span>&gt;</span>0.8<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span>))
    tf = insight.text_frame
    p = tf.paragraphs[<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-number"</span>&gt;</span>0<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span>]
    p.text = <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-string"</span>&gt;</span>"rank r <span class="hljs-symbol">&amp;lt;</span><span class="hljs-symbol">&amp;lt;</span> d: Train only ~0.1% of parameters while preserving model capabilities"<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span>
    p.font.size = Pt(<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-number"</span>&gt;</span>14<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span>)
    p.font.color.rgb = DARK_BLUE
    p.alignment = PP_ALIGN.CENTER

    p = tf.add_paragraph()
    p.text = <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-string"</span>&gt;</span>"Example: d=4096, r=32 → 99.2% fewer trainable parameters"<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span>
    p.font.size = Pt(<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-number"</span>&gt;</span>12<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span>)
    p.font.color.rgb = GRAY
    p.alignment = PP_ALIGN.CENTER
    <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-keyword"</span>&gt;</span>return<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span> slide

<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-function"</span>&gt;</span><span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-keyword"</span>&gt;</span>def<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span> <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-title"</span>&gt;</span>add_results_chart<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span><span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-params"</span>&gt;</span>(prs)<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span>:<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span>
    <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-string"</span>&gt;</span>"""Visual chart of Math RL results."""<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span>
    slide = prs.slides.add_slide(prs.slide_layouts[<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-number"</span>&gt;</span>6<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span>])

    title_box = slide.shapes.add_textbox(Inches(<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-number"</span>&gt;</span>0.5<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span>), Inches(<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-number"</span>&gt;</span>0.15<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span>), Inches(<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-number"</span>&gt;</span>9<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span>), Inches(<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-number"</span>&gt;</span>0.7<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span>))
    tf = title_box.text_frame
    p = tf.paragraphs[<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-number"</span>&gt;</span>0<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span>]
    p.text = <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-string"</span>&gt;</span>"Math RL Results: Learning Curve"<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span>
    p.font.size = Pt(<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-number"</span>&gt;</span>28<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span>)
    p.font.bold = <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-literal"</span>&gt;</span>True<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span>
    p.font.color.rgb = DARK_BLUE

<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">pre</span>&gt;</span>

          <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">pre</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"python"</span>&gt;</span>    y_axis = slide.shapes.add_shape(MSO_SHAPE.RECTANGLE, Inches(<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-number"</span>&gt;</span>1.5<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span>), Inches(<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-number"</span>&gt;</span>1.3<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span>), Inches(<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-number"</span>&gt;</span>0.03<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span>), Inches(<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-number"</span>&gt;</span>4.2<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span>))
    y_axis.fill.solid()
    y_axis.fill.fore_color.rgb = DARK_BLUE
    y_axis.line.fill.background()

        pt.fill.solid()
        pt.fill.fore_color.rgb = GREEN

        p.font.color.rgb = GREEN

<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">div</span>&gt;</span>
<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">p</span>&gt;</span>Annotation box<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">p</span>&gt;</span>

        <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">td</span>&gt;</span>
        <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">td</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"code highlight"</span>&gt;</span>
          <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">pre</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"python"</span>&gt;</span>    ann_box = slide.shapes.add_shape(MSO_SHAPE.ROUNDED_RECTANGLE, Inches(<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-number"</span>&gt;</span>7.3<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span>), Inches(<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-number"</span>&gt;</span>1.5<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span>), Inches(<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-number"</span>&gt;</span>2.4<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span>), Inches(<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-number"</span>&gt;</span>2.5<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span>))
    ann_box.fill.solid()
    ann_box.fill.fore_color.rgb = LIGHT_GRAY
    ann_box.line.color.rgb = GRAY

    ann = slide.shapes.add_textbox(Inches(<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-number"</span>&gt;</span>7.4<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span>), Inches(<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-number"</span>&gt;</span>1.6<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span>), Inches(<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-number"</span>&gt;</span>2.2<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span>), Inches(<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-number"</span>&gt;</span>2.3<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span>))
    tf = ann.text_frame
    tf.word_wrap = <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-literal"</span>&gt;</span>True<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span>

    p = tf.paragraphs[<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-number"</span>&gt;</span>0<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span>]
    p.text = <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-string"</span>&gt;</span>"Key Results:"<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span>
    p.font.size = Pt(<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-number"</span>&gt;</span>13<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span>)
    p.font.bold = <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-literal"</span>&gt;</span>True<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span>
    p.font.color.rgb = DARK_BLUE

    results = [<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-string"</span>&gt;</span>"• 69.5% → 100%"<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span>, <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-string"</span>&gt;</span>"• Converged in 20 steps"<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span>, <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-string"</span>&gt;</span>"• ~2 min training"<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span>, <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-string"</span>&gt;</span>"• Perfect accuracy"<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span>]
    <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-keyword"</span>&gt;</span>for<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span> r <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-keyword"</span>&gt;</span>in<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span> results:
        p = tf.add_paragraph()
        p.text = r
        p.font.size = Pt(<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-number"</span>&gt;</span>11<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span>)
        p.font.color.rgb = GRAY
    <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-keyword"</span>&gt;</span>return<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span> slide

<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-function"</span>&gt;</span><span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-keyword"</span>&gt;</span>def<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span> <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-title"</span>&gt;</span>add_table_slide<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span><span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-params"</span>&gt;</span>(prs, title, headers, rows)<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span>:<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span>
    slide = prs.slides.add_slide(prs.slide_layouts[<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-number"</span>&gt;</span>6<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span>])

    title_box = slide.shapes.add_textbox(Inches(<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-number"</span>&gt;</span>0.5<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span>), Inches(<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-number"</span>&gt;</span>0.3<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span>), Inches(<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-number"</span>&gt;</span>9<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span>), Inches(<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-number"</span>&gt;</span>0.8<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span>))
    tf = title_box.text_frame
    p = tf.paragraphs[<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-number"</span>&gt;</span>0<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span>]
    p.text = title
    p.font.size = Pt(<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-number"</span>&gt;</span>28<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span>)
    p.font.bold = <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-literal"</span>&gt;</span>True<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span>
    p.font.color.rgb = DARK_BLUE

    cols = len(headers)
    table = slide.shapes.add_table(len(rows) + <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-number"</span>&gt;</span>1<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span>, cols, Inches(<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-number"</span>&gt;</span>0.3<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span>), Inches(<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-number"</span>&gt;</span>1.2<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span>), Inches(<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-number"</span>&gt;</span>9.4<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span>), Inches(<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-number"</span>&gt;</span>0.5<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span> * (len(rows) + <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-number"</span>&gt;</span>1<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span>))).table

    <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-keyword"</span>&gt;</span>for<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span> i, header <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-keyword"</span>&gt;</span>in<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span> enumerate(headers):
        cell = table.cell(<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-number"</span>&gt;</span>0<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span>, i)
        cell.text = header
        cell.text_frame.paragraphs[<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-number"</span>&gt;</span>0<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span>].font.bold = <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-literal"</span>&gt;</span>True<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span>
        cell.text_frame.paragraphs[<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-number"</span>&gt;</span>0<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span>].font.size = Pt(<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-number"</span>&gt;</span>12<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span>)
        cell.fill.solid()
        cell.fill.fore_color.rgb = LIGHT_BLUE

    <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-keyword"</span>&gt;</span>for<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span> row_idx, row <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-keyword"</span>&gt;</span>in<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span> enumerate(rows):
        <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-keyword"</span>&gt;</span>for<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span> col_idx, value <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-keyword"</span>&gt;</span>in<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span> enumerate(row):
            cell = table.cell(row_idx + <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-number"</span>&gt;</span>1<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span>, col_idx)
            cell.text = str(value)
            cell.text_frame.paragraphs[<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-number"</span>&gt;</span>0<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span>].font.size = Pt(<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-number"</span>&gt;</span>11<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span>)
    <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-keyword"</span>&gt;</span>return<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span> slide

<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-function"</span>&gt;</span><span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-keyword"</span>&gt;</span>def<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span> <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-title"</span>&gt;</span>add_code_slide<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span><span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-params"</span>&gt;</span>(prs, title, code)<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span>:<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span>
    slide = prs.slides.add_slide(prs.slide_layouts[<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-number"</span>&gt;</span>6<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span>])

    title_box = slide.shapes.add_textbox(Inches(<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-number"</span>&gt;</span>0.5<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span>), Inches(<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-number"</span>&gt;</span>0.2<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span>), Inches(<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-number"</span>&gt;</span>9<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span>), Inches(<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-number"</span>&gt;</span>0.6<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span>))
    tf = title_box.text_frame
    p = tf.paragraphs[<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-number"</span>&gt;</span>0<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span>]
    p.text = title
    p.font.size = Pt(<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-number"</span>&gt;</span>26<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span>)
    p.font.bold = <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-literal"</span>&gt;</span>True<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span>
    p.font.color.rgb = DARK_BLUE

    code_bg = slide.shapes.add_shape(MSO_SHAPE.ROUNDED_RECTANGLE, Inches(<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-number"</span>&gt;</span>0.3<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span>), Inches(<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-number"</span>&gt;</span>0.9<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span>), Inches(<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-number"</span>&gt;</span>9.4<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span>), Inches(<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-number"</span>&gt;</span>5.8<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span>))
    code_bg.fill.solid()
    code_bg.fill.fore_color.rgb = RGBColor(<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-number"</span>&gt;</span>0x1e<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span>, <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-number"</span>&gt;</span>0x1e<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span>, <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-number"</span>&gt;</span>0x1e<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span>)
    code_bg.line.fill.background()

    code_box = slide.shapes.add_textbox(Inches(<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-number"</span>&gt;</span>0.5<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span>), Inches(<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-number"</span>&gt;</span>1.1<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span>), Inches(<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-number"</span>&gt;</span>9<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span>), Inches(<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-number"</span>&gt;</span>5.4<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span>))
    tf = code_box.text_frame
    tf.word_wrap = <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-literal"</span>&gt;</span>True<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span>
    p = tf.paragraphs[<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-number"</span>&gt;</span>0<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span>]
    p.text = code
    p.font.size = Pt(<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-number"</span>&gt;</span>12<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span>)
    p.font.name = <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-string"</span>&gt;</span>"Courier New"<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span>
    p.font.color.rgb = RGBColor(<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-number"</span>&gt;</span>0x00<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span>, <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-number"</span>&gt;</span>0xff<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span>, <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-number"</span>&gt;</span>0x00<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span>)
    <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-keyword"</span>&gt;</span>return<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span> slide

<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-function"</span>&gt;</span><span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-keyword"</span>&gt;</span>def<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span> <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-title"</span>&gt;</span>main<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span><span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-params"</span>&gt;</span>()<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span>:<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span>
    prs = Presentation()

        <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">td</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"code highlight"</span>&gt;</span>
          <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">pre</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"python"</span>&gt;</span>    add_content_slide(prs, <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-string"</span>&gt;</span>"Key Findings"<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span>, [
        <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-string"</span>&gt;</span>"Simple tasks (arithmetic): RL achieves 100% in ~20 steps"<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span>,
        <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-string"</span>&gt;</span>"Complex tasks (GSM8K): Requires more training, larger models"<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span>,
        <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-string"</span>&gt;</span>"Preference learning: Effective for stylistic control"<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span>,
        <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-string"</span>&gt;</span>"Distillation: Efficient knowledge transfer"<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span>,
        <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-string"</span>&gt;</span>"Cloud training: Accessible without local GPUs"<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span>
    ])

<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">pre</span>&gt;</span>
        <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">td</span>&gt;</span>

<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">div</span>&gt;</span>

<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">li</span>&gt;</span>Future Work<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">li</span>&gt;</span>

        <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">td</span>&gt;</span>
        <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">td</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"code highlight"</span>&gt;</span>
          <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">pre</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"python"</span>&gt;</span>    add_content_slide(prs, <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-string"</span>&gt;</span>"Future Directions"<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span>, [
        <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-string"</span>&gt;</span>"Code generation with sandbox (DeepCoder)"<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span>,
        <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-string"</span>&gt;</span>"Multi-agent RL training"<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span>,
        <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-string"</span>&gt;</span>"RLHF with human preference data"<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span>,
        <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-string"</span>&gt;</span>"Scaling to larger models (8B, 32B)"<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span>,
        <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-string"</span>&gt;</span>"Custom reward functions"<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span>

<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">pre</span>&gt;</span>

<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">ol</span> <span class="hljs-attr">start</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"14"</span>&gt;</span>
<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">li</span>&gt;</span>Thank You<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">li</span>&gt;</span>
<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">ol</span>&gt;</span>

        <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">td</span>&gt;</span>
        <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">td</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"code highlight"</span>&gt;</span>
          <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">pre</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"python"</span>&gt;</span>    add_title_slide(prs, <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-string"</span>&gt;</span>"Thank You!"<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span>, <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-string"</span>&gt;</span>"Questions?\n\npes-llm-research/tinker-experiments"<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span>)

    output_path = <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-string"</span>&gt;</span>'/home/ubuntu/pes-llm-research/tinker-experiments/Tinker_RL_Demo.pptx'<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span>
    prs.save(output_path)
    print(<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-string"</span>&gt;</span>f"Presentation saved to <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-subst"</span>&gt;</span>{output_path}<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span>"<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span>)
    print(<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-string"</span>&gt;</span>f"Total slides: <span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">span</span> <span class="hljs-attr">class</span>=<span class="hljs-string">"hljs-subst"</span>&gt;</span>{len(prs.slides)}<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span>"<span class="hljs-tag">&lt;/<span class="hljs-name">span</span>&gt;</span>)
